name: Spring Health Mental Health Benefits REST API
what_it_does: Spring Health precision mental health benefits REST API for employers, health plans, and HR platforms to manage employee mental health benefit eligibility, personalized care matching, therapy session management, care navigation, and wellness outcomes tracking — using Spring Health's precision mental health model that matches employees to the right care level — enabling automated EAP benefit administration, care matching, session management, and population health reporting through Spring Health's AI-powered mental health benefits platform. Enables AI agents to manage eligibility management for employee and dependent mental health benefit enrollment verification automation, handle care matching for AI-driven personalized therapist and care level matching automation, access appointment management for therapy and coaching session booking automation, retrieve utilization reporting for aggregate benefit usage and ROI automation, manage navigator integration for care navigator workflow and escalation automation, handle clinical outcomes for standardized mental health outcome measure aggregation automation, access crisis management for crisis response protocol and escalation automation, retrieve population analytics for workforce mental health trend reporting automation, manage HRIS integration for employee eligibility sync and lifecycle change automation, and integrate Spring Health with HR platforms, HRIS, and health plan systems for employer mental health benefit automation.
use_cases: Automating employee mental health benefit eligibility and enrollment for HR automation agents
Managing session booking and care navigation for employer mental health benefits automation agents
Reporting aggregate workforce mental health utilization and outcomes for benefits analytics agents
Integrating HRIS changes with mental health benefit eligibility for HR lifecycle automation agents
not_for: Direct clinical care systems (Spring Health API is for employer benefit administration, not clinical EHR)
Individual consumer mental health services (Spring Health serves employer-sponsored benefits, not direct-to-consumer)
International mental health benefits outside Spring Health's network markets
best_when: A large employer, health plan, or benefits administrator wanting AI agents to automate employee mental health benefit eligibility, care matching, and utilization reporting through Spring Health's precision mental health benefits platform.
avoid_when: EMPLOYER CONTRACT REQUIRED: Spring Health serves employers and health plans; automated public-developer assumption creates employer_agreement_required; automated must be Spring Health employer client. PHI REQUIRES BAA: Employee mental health data is protected PHI; automated generic-data assumption creates HIPAA_violation for mental health data processing without signed BAA; automated must execute BAA and implement HIPAA-compliant data handling. DE-IDENTIFIED REPORTING ONLY: Spring Health provides only aggregate, de-identified reporting to employers; automated individual-access assumption creates HIPAA_access_violation for attempts to access individual employee care records; automated must use only de-identified aggregate reporting. AI MATCHING IS PROPRIETARY: Spring Health's precision mental health matching model is proprietary; automated manual-matching assumption creates care_mismatch for bypassing Spring Health's AI matching in favor of manual provider assignment; automated should use Spring Health's matching API for optimal care routing.

auth.notes: Spring Health uses OAuth2 for Mental Health Benefits REST API. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2016 by April Koh and Adam Chekroud. Raised $370M+ (General Catalyst, Tiger Global). $2.5B valuation (2023). Products: Spring Health Care Matching, Spring Health Care Navigation, Spring Health Manager Coaching. 500+ enterprise customers including JP Morgan Chase, Microsoft, Target. Competes with Lyra Health, Modern Health, and Brightside for employer mental health benefits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public trial; production requires Spring Health employer partnership agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual per-employee pricing for employer benefit; enterprise custom pricing based on employee count and benefit design
pricing.notes: New York NY. $2.5B valuation. $370M raised. 500+ enterprise clients. JP Morgan, Microsoft, Target. Mental health benefits leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; benefit administration APIs throttled per employer agreement

known_agent_gotchas: ONLY AGGREGATE DATA IS AVAILABLE: Spring Health provides de-identified aggregate population reporting; automated individual-member assumption creates HIPAA_violation for individual employee mental health data access attempts; automated must use only aggregate, de-identified population reporting

ELIGIBILITY SYNC HAS LATENCY: HRIS-driven eligibility updates have processing latency; automated real-time assumption creates eligibility_not_updated for newly added employees not yet reflected in Spring Health; automated must account for eligibility sync delay

CRISIS ESCALATION REQUIRES LIVE RESPONSE: Crisis cases require human response from Spring Health's care team; automated automated-crisis assumption creates safety_gap for crisis events without human care team escalation; automated must ensure crisis escalations reach Spring Health's 24/7 care team

CARE MATCHING IS AI-DRIVEN: Spring Health's provider matching uses proprietary AI; automated manual-provider assumption creates care_mismatch for implementations bypassing the AI matching endpoint; automated must use Spring Health's matching API for optimal provider assignment

MEMBER CONSENT IS REQUIRED: Accessing any member care touchpoints requires member consent; automated employer-access assumption creates unauthorized_access for member care data without explicit member consent; automated must implement consent requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mental health benefits. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Employee mental health and PHI data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mental health benefits. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Employee mental health and PHI data.
